title: Tests, docs and acceptance
goal: Complete verification, update project structure metadata and record acceptance for the workorder tree implementation.
requirements: Add targeted unit and view tests for branch access, tree projection, mode switching and forms.
Add e2e test for manager tree navigation, drawer open and edit.
Add e2e or view test for customer branch isolation.
Update docs only where behavior changes user or operator workflow.
Record actual verification commands and results in executor report.
acceptance: All agreed checks pass or documented residual risk is accepted.
Workflow block has implementation report and acceptance file.
No temporary files are left outside .local/.
verification: E2E_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 E2E_USERNAME=chief_manager E2E_PASSWORD=... npm run test:e2e -- --project=chromium --grep "workorder tree"
